parameters.name: funkyUrl
parameters.description: The base URL for Operator to call.

parameters.name: X-Request-ID
parameters.description: Identifier for log tracing. Please use a mixed alphanumeric string in the form of a UUID, with a length of up to 64 characters.

parameters.name: data[].playerId
parameters.description: The unique ID of the player. At least 3 characters are required. **Cannot exceed 64 characters.**

parameters.name: data[].voucherId
parameters.description: If player is using voucher, fill in the unique id of voucher.

parameters.name: data[].fixStake
parameters.description: Fixed value of the voucher. If 0 or less is provided for certain types of vouchers, a minimum stake will be assigned by system. Please use GetVoucherStakes API to get supported stake values for the specified game and currency.

parameters.name: data[].gameCodes[]
parameters.description: The list of game codes to identify games.

parameters.name: data[].eventId
parameters.description: Please contact operation team to get your event id
